snippet.title: Dani Mocanu ūüēäÔłŹ Omul fara Tine este pierdut | Official Video
snippet.description:
Abona»õi-vńÉ http://www.youtube.com/danimocanuoficial
Toate drepturile rezervate artistului ¬© & ¬ģ Dani Mocanu
Versurile acestei melodii le regasiti jos in descriere

Strofa 1 :
Nu ma compar deloc cu tine Doamne
In mine ca om am multa rautate
Daia incerc de la o zi la alta
Sa las raul deoparte sa iau bunatatea
Si promisiunea mea fata de tine
Asa va fi ca doar asa imi va fi bine
Nu mai vreau sa mai fac nimic lumesc
Dragoste in tine sa gasesc

Refren X2
Omul fara tine este pierdut
Imi pare rau ca minte n-am avut
Sa te cunosc mai demult trebuia
Dar ma gandeam decat la viata mea

Strofa 2 :
In mine a intrat un duh curat
Toata lumea imi spune ce mult m-am schimbat
Si vreau sa-ti urmez calea pana la sfarsit
Iti multumesc Doamne ca tu m-ai ocrotit
Vreau sa fii umbra mea mereu sa fii cu mine
Ca doar langa tine Domnul meu imi e bine
In tine am toata baza si-ncrederea
Ca lumea din jurul meu e rea

Refren X2
Omul fara tine este pierdut
Imi pare rau ca minte n-am avut
Sa te cunosc mai demult trebuia
Dar ma gandeam decat la viata mea

snippet.description:
Te-am dus unde se da Moda  Florin Salam Antonio  Amyr Miche  Relu Pustiu 2021
https://www.facebook.com/KompactPlay

snippet.title: Watch NASA‚Äôs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover ‚Äď the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space ‚Äď search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA‚Äôs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: DA BRAVO! Podcast #1 cu chef Sorin Bontea
snippet.description:
ūüĒ• Podcast Notes - DaBravo! Podcast #1 cu chef Sorin Bontea I Mihai Bobonete
Podcastul cu Sorin este o incursiune in evenimentele importante din viata sa, de la botez, la majorat, la cum si-a cunoscut sotia si ce spune despre copiii sai. O poveste stropita cu mult umor si vin rosu spaniol, recomandat de un prieten bun. La final a primit un cadou, i-am luat tensiunea si mi-a lasat autograful pe masa studioului.

ūüĒ• 03:20 Pentru ca Sorin a gatit la nunta mea, m-am simtit dator sa-i promit ca-i voi intoarce serviciul la urmatorul eveniment major al sau

ūüĒ• 07:53 El nu mai are amintiri de la botezul sau, asa ca i-am aratat eu poze de la al meu. Ma rog, am mai plusat cu niste poze de l-a busit rasul ūüėĀ

ūüĒ• 09:54 La majorat, Sorin a primit cadou o cutie cu sunca d-aia buna, cum era pe atunci, inainte de revolutie. Lucra deja intr-un restaurant inainte de a implini 18 ani. Ce-si mai aminteste ...

ūüĒ• 12:12 Cum si-a cunoscut sotia. Stiti bancul cu trandafirul rosu? ūüėā

ūüĒ• 17:50 Din banii de la nunta si-a luat Dacie. Una crem, cu geamuri fumurii. A numit-o Didina. "Asa masina proasta n-am vazut in viata mea, n-a bagat cald niciodata ..."

ūüĒ• 22:15 Despre copii. Cum le dadea sa manance si ce nu i-a facut acum mare, baiatului, in versiunea mea 

ūüĒ• 33:40 Momentul in care am dat din ras in plans. Lui Sorin i s-au umezit ochii cand am discutat de perioada in care era pe vas si era departe de familie

ūüĒ• 39:40 Sorin e omul care se bucura de fiecare moment al vietii lui fara sa forteze lucrurile, este un om cu o energie aparte

ūüĒ• 43:03 Ce vin am baut. Sa ascultati descrierea, e mai de colectie decat vinul ūüėā

ūüĒ• 45:30 Am dat-o pe pescuit, pasiunea noastra comuna. Sorin are un mare stil ... in a se lauda ... 

ūüĒ• 50:35 Ce dorinte ar alege Sorin pentru mine daca ar prinde pestisorul de aur. A inceput batranicios, cica i-ar cere sa fiu sanatos ūüėā ... Apoi a indreptat lucrurile ...

ūüĒ• 58:53 Rubricile de final, cu "gingale hand-made", ca n-am apucat sa le facem in studio. Intrebari scurte si la obiect ūüėĀ

ūüĒ• 1.00:34 L-am provocat si i-am luat tensiunea: 13 cu 5
.....
ūüĎČ Subscribe sau aboneaza-te pentru mai mult: https://goo.gl/9gN6Yd
....
A/V:  WorkHorse 
https://www.instagram.com/workhorse.ro
DP: Dan Petru
Second Camera: Bogdan Trestianu
Director: Florin Ivan
Contact management & booking:

ūüĎČ  Madalina Lazar: 0722329263 

Urmareste-ma si pe:

ūüĎČFacebook: https://www.facebook.com/bobonetevirtualu/

ūüĎČInstagram: https://www.instagram.com/boboneteee/

ūüĎČSite: http://www.mihaibobonete.ro

ūüĎČTwitter: https://twitter.com/bobonete


MCN YouTube: BrandTube - office@brandtube.ro

RAVA ūüź≤ KILLA FONIC - SOCHERES MERUNDO (Official Video)

Interpretare si Text: RAVA, Killa Fonic
Instrumental: JoeyCrack
Productie aditionala: PRNY
Producator executiv: Lu-K Beats
Recording si Aranjament by ACLI
Mixat√£ si Masterizat√£ la Seek Music, inginer de sunet: Lu-K Beats

Data lansare: 17.02.2020
Video Directed by 128 Vision
Video Concept by Lu-K Beats & 128 Vision
Video Production by Ana Carmen
Scenografie by Lavinia Stancu
Long Exposure Photos by DaveBach
Artwork by: Grafix

RAVA ūüź≤ KILLA FONIC - SOCHERES MERUNDO (Versuri)
_________________________________________________________________

Refren:
Pizde nasoale vorbesc incontinuu,
Ca-s fierte pe mine le e dor sa-mi faca pe plac,
Pardon »ôi cap,
Pun bani la ciorap te fac.

Strofa 1:
Uuuuuu,
Trebuie sa fac banii nu ma duuuc, 
Atatea pizde doar sa le fuuuut, 
Nu le dau nas, 
Pietre pe ceas, 
Nu pot sa le las, 
Seek Music, 
Prea mort fa, 
Nu ma agit, 
Ma stii ca sunt magic, 
Te driblez ca Hagi,
Karate Miyagi,
Sunt frate cu dracii, 
Doar asculta pasii, 
A venit sa-i rup obrajii, 
Fac bani, fac bani,
Din Giulesti Crangasi in Ferentari, 
Fac bani, fac bani, 
Golani haladiti cu arfe tari, 
Fac bani fac bani, 
Rupe-i gura daca-i de scandal, 
Fac bani fac bani, 
4 226 doar in clan.

Bridge:
Vrajeala multa,
Destula sa ne ajunga,
Mai trag o dunga, 
Astea vor doar sa ma suga,
Te stiu de mult fa, 
Te-am vazut esti prefacuta,
Vezi c-am valuta,
Da‚Äô n-o s-o arunc pe o curva.

Killa Fonic:
Hasta la muerte,
Cine se opune acum pierde,
Prea multa foame,
Au mult prea multa sete,
Noi foamea am pus-o in spate,
Departe cum stam de zeghe,
Cand n-ai maniere si ai doar carpe in stanga in dreapta e»ôti o carpa ah,
E»ôti doar carpa stai asa,
Nu-i nicio barfa totusi am fost diplomat pula mea,
Io‚Äô n-am gustat vreodata barfa gusta tu teava asta,
Baietii tai sunt Oompa loompa ai mei rad in cor,
Stiu cativa tigani care te-ar baga intr-un covor,
Un gest din degete si ai gura intinsa ca un sifon,
Ai grija cumva sa nu dispari nu lasi niciun dor,
Am valuta pe ai tai pe toti ii cumpar,
Foamea poate sa-i rupa dar ce face lacomia e wow,
Ai grija sluga sa nu dispari in vreo duba,
Un gest din incheietura,
Ajungi cu dintii pe bordura ah.
_________________________________________________________________

Am valuta pe ai tai pe toti ii cumpar,
Foamea poate sa-i rupa dar ce face lacomia e wow,
Ai grija sluga sa nu dispari in vreo duba,
Un gest din incheietura,
Ajungi cu dintii pe bordura ah.

snippet.title: Mortal Kombat (2021) - Official Red Band Trailer
snippet.description:
The Mortal Kombat movie reboot from director Simon McQuoid features the defenders of Earthrealm Liu Kang, Sonya Blade, Jax Briggs and more entering the Mortal Kombat tournament to save the world from Shang Tsung, Sub-Zero, Mileena and other supernatural kombatants.

This red band Mortal Kombat (2021) trailer shows off why it's rated R.

Mortal Kombat movie release date April 16, 2021.

Lyrics:
I‚Äôm on an island
Even when you‚Äôre close
Can‚Äôt take the silence
I‚Äôd rather be alone
I think it‚Äôs pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
It‚Äôs time I wave goodbye from the window
Let‚Äôs end this like we should and say we‚Äôre good

We‚Äôre not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let‚Äôs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you‚Äôre with somebody else
As long as you swear you won‚Äôt be pissed when I do it myself 
Let‚Äôs end it like we should and say we‚Äôre good

No need to hide it 
Go get what you want
This won‚Äôt be a burden if we both don‚Äôt hold a grudge

We gave it all we could
It‚Äôs time I wave goodbye from the window
Let‚Äôs end this like we should and say we‚Äôre good

We‚Äôre not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let‚Äôs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you‚Äôre with somebody else
As long as you swear you won‚Äôt be pissed when I do it myself 
Let‚Äôs end it like we should and say we‚Äôre good

Now you‚Äôre holding this against me
Like I knew you would
I tried my best to make this easy
So don‚Äôt give me that look just say we‚Äôre good

We‚Äôre not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So let‚Äôs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when you‚Äôre with somebody else
As long as you swear you won‚Äôt be pissed when I do it myself 
Let‚Äôs end it like we should and say we‚Äôre good

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We‚Äôve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here‚Äôs what we created. Aren‚Äôt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let‚Äôs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you‚Äôll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 ‚ÄĒ How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 ‚ÄĒ DIY ring 

2:48 ‚ÄĒ Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 ‚ÄĒ DIY hair comb 

6:53 ‚ÄĒ Cute DIY earrings 

9:03 ‚ÄĒ DIY fake nails
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

The following video might feature activity performed by our actors within controlled environment- please use judgment, care, and precaution if you plan to replicate.

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn‚Äôt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone‚Äôs favorite activity, but it can be very messy ‚ÄĒ and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one‚Äôs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won‚Äôt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 ‚ÄĒ The pacifier hack 

2:42 ‚ÄĒ A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 ‚ÄĒ The getting along/best friends‚Äô shirt 

7:20 ‚ÄĒ Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 ‚ÄĒ Tasty gummy bear lollies

Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32‚Äô to tie at one and added two more in the 65‚Äô and 85‚Äô. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70‚Äô to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27‚Äô by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

snippet.title: Mars Rover Landing Overview- NOW SAFE ON MARS!!!
snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

Watch the live stream- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gm0b_ijaYMQ&ab_channel=NASA
Main rover landing page- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
Cool rover interactive animation of the 7 mins of terror- https://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/mars2020/#/home?id=surface_operations&time=2021-02-18T12:44:05.006-08:00&rate=0
Spin the rover around in 3D- https://mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/spacecraft/rover/

Here is the video about why we should explore space even with problems here on Earth- https://youtu.be/lARpY0nIQx0

Music for the montage-

Explosions in the Sky
(Post-rock, four-member band from Texas.)

First Breath After Coma
https://youtu.be/w0o8JCxjjpM

Your Hand In Mine
https://youtu.be/cdiY6kijYHE

Song at 11:21- Bottles by A Shell in the Pit- https://open.spotify.com/track/0m6GMysIDx3gcQc6TF6HEX?si=FhjTlbBbQKayFrYtrw0dlg

snippet.title: Zapada, gheata si mult frig - CEL MAI FRUMOS DRUM DIN ROMANIA
snippet.description:
Bicicletele din clip: https://www.sportguru.ro/sporturi/ciclism/biciclete/biciclete-e-bike-hybrid

Drumul dintre Comarnic si Campina prin Secaria si Tesila este absolut incredibil. Indiferent cu ce mergi. Cu masina, pe jos, cu bicicleta. In plus, in orice anotimp arata bine. Desigur, vara, cand totul este verde si plin de viata lucrurile sunt si mai frumoase, dar, noi ne-am incapatanat sa il vizitam iarna. 
Este un drum de dificultate medie, clar pentru cineva antrenat pentru ca prezinta multe uracari si curbe in ac de par in care vii cu viteza de peste 60km/h daca nu apesi franele. Din localitatea Tesila, daca faci stanga si lasi in urma Campina te poti indrepta prin munti catre Sacele. Desi multe camping-uri in acea zona, mare atentie pentru ca acea zona este frecventata de ursi. 

Canalul lui SebiPOV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpuvNQ0ttUgIVU3dHikjbUQ

Link traseu: https://www.google.ro/maps/dir/C%C3%A2mpina,+105600/Comarnic/@45.2122453,25.6665932,12.25z/data=!4m19!4m18!1m10!1m1!1s0x40b3007e06e471ab:0x8d24be2ca6c16a32!2m2!1d25.742141!2d45.1369957!3m4!1m2!1d25.7289158!2d45.2782084!3s0x40b30f3e1ffd3827:0x5a0bc1357da0c807!1m5!1m1!1s0x40b30511796cf921:0xd3b44c9f28af3486!2m2!1d25.6408029!2d45.2488709!3e2?hl=ro

Ma poti urmari si pe Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/bucharestbiketraffic/

De unde imi cumpar trotinetele electrice: https://www.evomag.ro/sport-fitness-vehicule-electrice-trotinete-electrice/

Ma poti contacta aici : bucharestbikeprojects@gmail.com 

Pe TikTok sunt aici: https://www.tiktok.com/@bucharestbiketraffic?

Music by Epidemic Sound (http://www.epidemicsound.com)

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure Superman‚Äôs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube
